districts.name: Echo Gate
districts.summary: Porters tune their loads before the mountain is allowed to hear them.
districts.featureDescription: The blue fork hums the true weight of every burden passing beneath it.

districts.name: Light-Cistern Court
districts.summary: Faceted towers store afternoon for workshops, concerts, and royal emergencies.
districts.featureDescription: Amber daylight sleeps behind blue facets and rolls over in response to song.

districts.name: Tuners' Steps
districts.summary: Open workshops test cracked crystal against snow, bells, and opinionated wind.
districts.featureDescription: Graduated hollows compare a crystal's answer to the mountain's oldest note.

landmarks.name: the silent avalanche
landmarks.description: A white wall of snow hangs motionless above the path until somebody sings the missing note.
